zones.name: Arizona
zones.lore: Sun-drenched and surprisingly affordable by coastal standards. Phoenix is among the fastest-growing cities in the US. Summers are legendary in their brutality.

quests.label: Federal Work Authorization
quests.detail: US work visa or citizenship required.

zones.name: California
zones.lore: The zone where dreams are manufactured and rent devours them. Unmatched in innovation; unmatched in housing costs. The hardest domestic zone to survive financially.

quests.label: Federal Work Authorization
quests.detail: US work visa or citizenship required.

quests.label: Secure Housing Before Arrival
quests.detail: Median 1BR rent ~$2,400/month in metro areas.

zones.name: Colorado
zones.lore: Mile-high and mountain-adjacent. Denver has become a tech hub with outdoor life buffs. Housing costs have spiked significantly since 2020.
